plugins.prepareCmd: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const m=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('manifest.json','utf8'));m.version='${nextRelease.version}';fs.writeFileSync('manifest.json',JSON.stringify(m,null,2)+'\n');" && zip -r before-you-leave-${nextRelease.version}.zip manifest.json content.js options.js options.html options.css dialog.css template-storage.js lock-icon.svg icons/
